description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using ubuntu:16.04 as the default Docker image and johnpapa/angular-cli for the frontend job. Define stages frontend, build, test, and install-packages and set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the frontend stage add a frontend job that changes to the frontend-angular directory, runs npm install and ng build --prod, caches the frontend-angular/node_modules/ path, and stores the build/web directory as a build_frontend artifact. In the build stage add a build job with a before_script that updates apt, installs wget and software-properties-common, downloads and installs CMake 3.10, creates symlinks for cmake and cpack, installs zlib1g-dev, libopenblas-dev, liblapack-dev, libuv-dev, build-essential, libssl-dev, git, python, adds the ubuntu-toolchain-r/test PPA, installs g++-7, configures gcc alternatives, and prints cmake and g++ versions; cache the cmake-build directory, trainServer/dependencies/mxnet, trainServer/dependencies/seasocks, and /root/.hunter, depend on the frontend job, then creates cmake-build, runs cmake .., make -j $(nproc), cpack -G DEB -V and cpack -G TGZ, and always uploads the build/ and cmake-build/ directories as a build_output artifact. In the test stage add a test job that depends on build and runs ./build/catflow-test. In the install-packages stage add an install-packages job that depends on build, runs ls, and publishes the build/pack directory as an openhabai-install-package artifact.
